_about: Edit this file to change the model. Coordinates define the area; everything else is sizing/colors. Run: python run.py config.json

area._comment: bbox is [west, south, east, north] in degrees (the box drawn on map2model). Set bbox=null and use center_lat/lon + span_m instead if you prefer a square defined by its centre.

tiling._comment: 1x1 = a single 500 mm piece (chunk it yourself in the slicer). Set rows/cols to 2 for four 250 mm tiles that fit the 256 mm X1E plate.

colors._comment: sRGB hex (matched to your map2model export). These map straight to objects in the .3mf; assign an AMS filament to each in Bambu Studio.

elevation._comment: Mapterhorn terrarium tiles; AWS Mapzen terrarium PNG is the per-tile fallback (identical encoding). zoom 14 ~ 5 m/px here (finer than the model can print at this scale); 15 for max relief detail, 13 to fetch fewer tiles.
